title: Implement sparse FieldMatrix (CSR/CSC) over FiniteField
description:
Generic sparse matrix analogous to `SpBitMatrix`/`SpBitMatrixDual` but for arbitrary finite fields.

## Formats

- **CSR** (Compressed Sparse Row): efficient row access and SpMV
- **CSC** (Compressed Sparse Column): efficient column access
- Conversion between CSR/CSC and dense `FieldMatrix`

## Operations

- SpMV: `sparse * FieldVec<F> -> FieldVec<F>`
- SpMM: `sparse * FieldMatrix<F> -> FieldMatrix<F>` (sparse x dense)
- Element access, row/col iterators
- Construction from triplets `(row, col, value)`

## Location

`crates/gf2-core/src/field/sparse_matrix.rs`

## Dependencies

- FieldMatrix dense type (ab791e27)
- FieldVec scalar container (54a60c90)
